---
title: "I woke up Canadian!"
author: "Joanna R. Pepin"
date: "2026-03-25"
categories: [Pepin, Julius, news, me, Bill C‑3]
#image: jays.png
#image-alt: "A giant Canadian flag on display in the outfield of the Blue Jays stadium."
#image-placement: none
filters:
    - openlinksinnewpage
draft: true
---
